name: acc-collab-runtime
description: Coordinate multi-agent file claims, inbox sync, and handoffs around a private ACC CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate concurrent agents with inbox sync, leases, and handoffs
interface.longDescription: Bring ACC-based multi-agent coordination into Codex with a reusable skill, convenience commands, and a disciplined workflow for inbox sync, narrow file claims, lease renewal, and explicit handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use ACC Collaboration Runtime to coordinate this task with other agents: sync inbox, claim touched files, renew while working, and release with a concise handoff.
